statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.WhileLoopTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName FROM bronze.Product ORDER BY ProductID OFFSET @Offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @BatchSize ROWS ONLY
